Do not use hard-coded magic strings for selectors repeatedly across multiple test files
Do not store sensitive credentials directly in test source code; use environment variables or secret managers
Do not rely on global mutable state shared between test files as tests run in isolation by default
Do not use CSS or XPath selectors when user-facing locators (getByRole, getByText, getByLabel) are available
Do not cache page or browser references in module-level variables; they become stale across tests
Do not duplicate locator definitions; extract them into Page Objects or shared constants
